creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
It builds now, thanks.
I don't build head, so I'm not sure. 

I had built this with
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=mysql=10.4m apache=2.4 ruby=2.6 pgsql=14 perl5=5.32

I've since removed the forced build against ruby 2.6 (it was more of a legacy thing).

I will try without your patch again in a few days.
